criteria_groups.name: Technical Skills
criteria_groups.description: Core technical competency and engineering excellence

criteria.name: Core Technical Competency
criteria.description: Mastery of role-essential technologies (Python, React, PostgreSQL, AWS). Can ship production-quality full-stack features independently.
evaluation_prompts: Does the candidate demonstrate deep expertise in our core stack?
Evidence of shipping production code independently?
Can they work across the full stack (frontend, backend, infrastructure)?
red_flags: No code samples or GitHub activity
Technologies listed don't match work history

criteria.name: System Design & Architecture
criteria.description: Can make pragmatic architectural decisions, balance trade-offs, and design scalable systems without over-engineering.
evaluation_prompts: Does candidate understand architectural trade-offs?
Evidence of building scalable systems (0→100k+ users)?
Pragmatic vs. over-engineering tendencies?

criteria.name: Code Quality & Craftsmanship
criteria.description: Writes clean, maintainable, well-tested code. Values code quality but ships iteratively.
evaluation_prompts: Is their code clean and readable?
Evidence of testing practices?
Balance between perfection and iteration?

criteria_groups.name: Startup Fit
criteria_groups.description: Thrives in early-stage chaos, takes ownership, adapts quickly

criteria.name: Startup Mindset
criteria.description: Thrives in ambiguity, wears multiple hats, resourceful problem-solver. Experience building 0→1.
evaluation_prompts: Experience at early-stage startups (seed/Series A)?
Evidence of building products from scratch (0→1)?
Comfort with ambiguity and rapid change?
Generalist capabilities beyond core specialty?
red_flags: Need for structure and defined process

criteria.name: Ownership & Initiative
criteria.description: Takes full responsibility for outcomes, drives projects to completion, doesn't wait to be told what to do.
evaluation_prompts: Evidence of taking initiative beyond job requirements?
Do they describe owning projects end-to-end?
Do they take responsibility for failures?
red_flags: Waiting to be told what to do

criteria.name: Adaptability & Learning
criteria.description: Learns new technologies quickly, pivots when needed, comfortable with changing requirements.
evaluation_prompts: Evidence of learning new domains quickly?
Career transitions or skill pivots?
Growth trajectory across roles?
green_flags: Specific examples of learning from failure

criteria_groups.name: Authenticity & Culture
criteria_groups.description: Genuine human beneath the application, mission-aligned, intrinsically motivated

criteria.name: Authenticity
criteria.description: Application reflects real person, not AI-generated or template-based. Unique voice and perspective.
evaluation_prompts: Does this sound like a real person?
AI-generation likelihood score?
Specificity and uniqueness across applicants?
Voice consistency across materials?

criteria.name: Mission Alignment
criteria.description: Genuine connection to company mission and problem space. Specific, researched reasons for interest.
evaluation_prompts: How specific is their 'why this company'?
Personal connection to problem or generic?
Evidence of deep research into company?
green_flags: Specific references to company's unique approach

criteria.name: Intrinsic Motivation
criteria.description: Passionate about the work itself, not just external rewards. Side projects, self-directed learning.
evaluation_prompts: Do they work on related projects outside work?
Evidence of deep curiosity?
Learning for its own sake?

criteria.name: Impact & Results
criteria.description: Demonstrated measurable impact in previous roles. Shipped products, moved metrics, created value.
evaluation_prompts: Are achievements quantified with metrics?
Evidence of moving key business metrics?
Specific contribution vs. team success?

criteria.name: Relevant Experience Depth
criteria.description: Sufficient years and depth of relevant engineering experience.
evaluation_prompts: At least 2 years of relevant full-stack experience?
Progression of responsibilities over time?
Validated via LinkedIn?

personas.description: Deep dive on technical skills, code quality, system design
Detect AI-generation, assess genuine passion and uniqueness

screening_questions.question: Describe the most technically challenging problem you've solved in the last year. What made it difficult, how did you approach it, and what was the outcome?
screening_questions.purpose: Assess technical depth, problem-solving process, and communication
follow_up_triggers: If mentions specific technologies in our stack → ask about depth
If describes impressive scale → validate with metrics
If vague or generic → probe for specifics

screening_questions.question: Tell us about a time you built something from scratch (0→1). What were the biggest challenges, and how did you navigate ambiguity?
follow_up_triggers: If mentions team → clarify individual contribution
If successful outcome → ask about trade-offs made
If mentions failure → probe for learnings

screening_questions.question: Why are you interested in joining us specifically? What about our mission, product, or approach resonates with you?
screening_questions.purpose: Assess mission alignment, research depth, authenticity
follow_up_triggers: If generic response → flag for low specificity
If highly specific → note as green flag
If mentions personal connection → explore deeper

green_flags: Open source maintainer of meaningful project (>500 stars)
Technical blog with deep, original content
Previous founding engineer at funded startup
Built side project with real users (>1000)
red_flags: High AI-generation likelihood (>70%) on any material
No GitHub activity despite claiming active developer
Generic 'why this company' matching multiple applicants
Frequent job hopping (<1 year average tenure)
Only big company experience, no scrappy environments

bonus_criteria.description: Maintains active open source project with >500 stars
Was founding engineer (employee 1-3) at funded startup
